home.heroSubtitle: Soft, safe and colorful. Designed for your baby's development.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to create a play space for your baby?
home.ctaSubtitle: Explore our selection of soft mats, foam puzzle mats and activity accessories, designed to stimulate and protect your child.
home.customSubtitle: Colorful play mats, foam puzzle mats and activity accessories selected for your baby's safety and comfort.
home.perfTitle: Designed for babies, approved by parents
home.perfText: Our products are made with non-toxic, CE-certified materials, free from BPA and formamide. Each mat is designed to provide a soft, safe and stimulating space for your baby's development.
home.guide1Title: How to choose the right play mat for your baby?
home.guide1P1: The choice depends on your child's age and needs. For newborns, opt for an [activity mat with arch](LINK_PRIMARY) that stimulates sight and motor skills from the very first days.
home.guide1P2: For babies starting to crawl, a large soft mat or XXL puzzle mat provides the space needed to explore safely.
home.guide2Title: Why choose an XXL play mat?
home.guide2P1: The [XXL play mat](LINK_XXL) has become parents' top choice. Its large format (150×200 cm or more) covers the entire play area and protects baby from hard surfaces.
home.guide2P2: It offers generous space to crawl, roll over and explore freely. Waterproof and easy to clean, it fits perfectly in the living room or baby's bedroom.
home.guide3Title: Safe materials, soft surface and colorful design
home.guide3P1: Quality shows in the materials. All our products are made with **non-toxic materials** CE certified, BPA and formamide free, suitable for contact with baby's sensitive skin.
home.guide3P2: The high-density EVA foam surface absorbs shocks, while **colorful and stimulating designs** encourage sensory development. Water-resistant and **easy to clean**, they stay hygienic every day.
